## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Evaluation / benchmark change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance

## Evidence

Commands run:

```bash
# paste relevant commands and outcomes
```

If this affects retrieval, conflict detection, confidence, prompts, or benchmark scoring, include the relevant VeraBench command/result or explain why it is not needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated where appropriate
- [ ] Documentation updated when commands, metrics, behavior, or config changed
- [ ] No API keys, local DBs, private corpora, or generated caches committed
- [ ] Results are reproducible or limitations are stated
